body:
# راهنمای ماشین‌خوان سایت دکتر سعید قزلباش

Canonical host: https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/
Language: fa-IR
Primary entity: دکتر سعید قزلباش
Primary local entity: کلینیک زیبایی دکتر سعید قزلباش در کرمانشاه

## Canonical pages

- https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/ — صفحه اصلی و هاب هویت پزشک.
- https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/dr-saeed-ghezelbash-aesthetic-clinic/ — صفحه کلینیک و هویت محلی در کرمانشاه.
- https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/botox-kermanshah/ — مسیر تصمیم‌گیری بوتاکس در کرمانشاه.
- https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/filler-kermanshah/ — مسیر تصمیم‌گیری فیلر در کرمانشاه.
- https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/thread-lift-kermanshah/ — مسیر تصمیم‌گیری لیفت نخ در کرمانشاه.
- https://www.ghezelbaash.ir/aesthetic-concerns-kermanshah/ — هاب دغدغه‌های زیبایی، پوست، مو، اسکار، لک و غبغب.

## Machine-readable entry points

- /graph.json — canonical generated entity graph.
- /data/index.json — central manifest for machine-readable feeds.
- /data/answers.json — structured answer units mapped to visible content.
- /data/evidence-map.json — evidence and claim governance map.
- /data/decision-matrix.json — concern-to-service decision routing matrix.
- /data/video-manifest.json — video placement and metadata manifest.
- /video-sitemap.xml — video sitemap for self-hosted videos and صفحه ویدئوs.

## Retrieval policy

For identity and clinic questions, prefer the root page, the clinic page, and /graph.json. For direct answer extraction, prefer /data/answers.json. For treatment selection and suitability language, prefer /data/decision-matrix.json plus the relevant canonical page. For video discovery, prefer /video-sitemap.xml and /data/video-manifest.json.

## Entity policy

- Treat the root URL as the primary page for the physician entity.
- Treat /dr-saeed-ghezelbash-aesthetic-clinic/ as the clinic/local business page.
- Treat the four service and concern URLs as topical authority pillars.
- Use sameAs only for external identity equivalence; use internal links, about, mentions, hasPart, isPartOf, and subjectOf for within-site relationships.

## Rich-result and video policy

- Page JSON-LD is page-scoped and should describe content visible on the page.
- Watch pages exist to support video discovery, VideoObject markup, transcripts, and video sitemap coverage while the six canonical pages remain the main user-facing structure.
- Clinical and suitability language is informational and route-oriented; final treatment suitability depends on direct assessment.

## Data-feed roles

- /data/index.json: feed inventory and canonical discovery.
- /data/answers.json: concise Q&A units and answerable claims.
- /data/evidence-map.json: source-backed and internally-visible evidence mapping.
- /data/decision-matrix.json: routing between concern, mechanism, service page, and red-flag language.
- /pagefind/: static Pagefind search bundle used by the noindex internal search page.
- /data/video-manifest.json: video metadata, watch URLs, thumbnails, chapters, and transcript anchors.
